# Third-party sources

## ViGEmClient

Vendored from [nefarius/ViGEmClient](https://github.com/nefarius/ViGEmClient) (MIT).

Compiled **statically** into `lanplay-controllers` via `packages/controllers/build.rs` on Windows.

Do not delete this tree; CI and local Windows builds require `ViGEmClient/src/ViGEmClient.cpp`.
